_description: MER 2024 high-agreement subset split. Utterances with per-utterance Fleiss kappa >= 0.70 are classified as high-agreement. Used in Table 8 of the paper.
_note: Full split IDs will be released at https://github.com/crossfusion-msa/crossfusion-msa upon paper acceptance. The kappa values are sourced from the MER 2024 dataset annotations (doi:10.1145/3689092.3689959).
